file: Jian - 2023 - Deep eutectic solvent assists H-β in aldol condensation of acetovanillone and p-hydroxybenzaldehyde.txt

experiments.description: 在由氯化胆碱和甲酸组成的低共熔溶剂（DES）中，使用H-β沸石催化剂催化乙酰香草酮（AV）和对羟基苯甲醛（PHB）进行羟醛缩合反应，制备C16高能量燃料前体。优化条件为：底物摩尔比1:2，5g ChCl/Fa (1:6)，15 wt% H-β，100℃反应120分钟。
experiments.text_snippet: To synthesize a fuel precursor, appropriate proportions of AV, PHB, DES, and catalyst were added to a 75 mL thick-walled pressure flask. When the magnetic stirrers reached the specified temperature (60–120 ℃), the magnetic stirring speed was adjusted to 400 rpm. After the reaction was complete, the flask was allowed to cool naturally to room temperature.

Solvent.value: Deep eutectic solvent (DES) composed of choline chloride and formic acid (ChCl/Fa, 1:6)
Solvent.original: Deep eutectic solvent (DES) composed of choline chloride and formic acid (ChCl/Fa, 1:6)

Catalyst stability.original: Better stability in DES than in conventional solvents; can be regenerated by calcination at 500℃ for 8 hours
